name: Patient
history: Past traumatic incident involving sexual assault by partner Ivan. Ongoing relationship difficulties involving trust and intimacy. Reports some improvement in relationship dynamics with Ivan making efforts to rebuild trust.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must adhere to societal expectations and obligations.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not entitled to prioritize my own needs or feelings.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and adherence to perceived obligations.
situation: Physical intimacy is resuming in the relationship.
auto_thought: I feel like I don't belong here and that I'm taking up space for someone who needs it more.
behavior: Attending therapy sessions out of obligation rather than desire.
